note: Known manufactured hardware modeled from manufacturer specifications rather than LiDAR scanned. Dimensions in metres (metersPerUnit=1.0), upAxis=Z. Each component is a ground-truth semantic instance (class + instance_id) — no ML segmentation needed for known hardware; the room walls/floor still come from the LPS-029 scan. Masses from manufacturer/representative figures (kg).

components.source: NVIDIA RTX 5090 FE spec (304x137mm, 2-slot); 2x present per nvidia-smi
representative ATX mid-tower envelope; replace with owner's exact case model
27in 16:9 panel envelope; replace with owner's exact monitor model
standard desk surface 1400x700mm at 750mm height; replace with owner's exact desk

room_from_scan.note: Walls, floor, and ceiling come from the LPS-029 LiDAR scan (irregular geometry manufacturers do not publish). Static structure.
